inst.name: LoanAgainstFD
inst.short-description: RESTStub component exposes Restful services in Fiorano environment
inst.long-description: RESTStub component exposes RESTFul services in Fiorano environment

inst.name: JSONConverter2
inst.short-description: JSONConverter component is used to convert data from JSON format to XML format and vice-versa.
inst.long-description: JSONConverter component is used to convert data from JSON format to XML format and vice-versa.

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT_1
inputport-instance.description: Receives message in XML format or JSON Object.

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT_1
outputport-instance.description: Sends JSON object or XML message depending on the conversion mode used.

inst.name: DB_INSERT_LOAN_FD
inst.short-description: The DBAdapter is a Query Engine that creates and executes a single SQL Statement or a set of queries to perform the database related operations such as insertion, updation, deletion, stored procedure execution or table monitoring
inst.long-description: The DBAdapter is a Query Engine that creates and executes a single SQL Statement or a set of queries to perform the database related operations such as insertion, updation, deletion, stored procedure execution or table monitoring

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Accepts data related to queries in XSD format

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Sends out results of the execution of SQL statements on the database

inst.name: JSONConverter7
inst.short-description: JSONConverter component is used to convert data from JSON format to XML format and vice-versa.

inst.name: T24Outbound
inst.long-description: T24outbound service sends OFS messages to T24-R22 systems

outputport-instance.name: Response
outputport-instance.description: Sends the messages to next component in workflow.

inst.name: T24Outbound1

outputport-instance.name: Response
